J1A_WEIGHT_CHG (J1A) Weight Gain/Loss of 3+ Pounds CHAR 1 Health conditions: problem conditions - indicators of fluid status - weight fluctuations 3+ pounds in 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
341 J1B J1B_NOT_LIE_FLAT (J1B) Inability to Lie Flat Due to Shortness of Breath CHAR 1 Health conditions: problem conditions - indicators of fluid status - inability to lie flat - shortness of breath in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
342 J1C J1C_DEHYDRATED (J1C) Dehydrated/Output
